old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-p2y5.2","title":"Gateway: IPv6 forwarding between mesh and backhaul","description":"## Overview

Forward IPv6 packets between mesh (LoRa L2) and backhaul (WiFi/Ethernet). This is the core border router data plane.

## Packet flow

### Mesh → Internet
1. Receive packet from LoRa L2
2. Decompress (SCHC)
3. Check destination:
   - If dest is mesh node → forward via LoRa (not this path)
   - If dest is off-mesh → forward to backhaul interface
4. Transmit on backhaul (WiFi/Ethernet)

### Internet → Mesh
1. Receive packet on backhaul interface
2. Lookup destination in RPL routing table
3. If found → compress (SCHC) and transmit via LoRa L2
4. If not found → ICMPv6 Destination Unreachable

## Implementation

### Zephyr networking
- Register as IPv6 router (net_if)
- Enable forwarding between interfaces
- Hook into Zephyr net stack or custom forwarding

### Interface binding
- LoRa L2 as one net_if
- Backhaul (WiFi/Eth) as another net_if
- Route between them based on destination

### MTU handling
- Backhaul MTU: 1500 (Ethernet) or 1280 (minimum IPv6)
- Mesh MTU: ~200 bytes (LoRa payload)
- SCHC handles compression, not fragmentation
- Packets too large after compression → ICMPv6 Packet Too Big

## Files
- lichen/apps/gateway/src/forwarding.c
- Integration with Zephyr net stack","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T20:36:38.50228Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T20:36:38.50228Z","labels":["gateway","networking","ipv6","core"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-p2y5.2","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-p2y5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T20:36:38.635067Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-p2y5.2","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-p2y5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-16T20:36:38.758323Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Implemented IPv6 forwarding in gateway/src/ble_lci_netif.c + main.c using net_if + RPL routing table for mesh<->backhaul; enabled CONFIG_NET_IP_FORWARDING=y, NET_ROUTE in prj.conf + Kconfig. Mesh->internet and internet->mesh paths work in sim. West build, Renode, Twister, interop tests pass. All closed.
